incidentSummary: This looks like a phishing-risk assessment/scan result screenshot rather than a direct scam message, but it includes a suspicious-looking domain (netlify.app subdomain) often associated with phishing/clone sites.
userNotes:
ScamShield assessment: medium risk (35/100), high confidence.

Summary: This looks like a phishing-risk assessment/scan result screenshot rather than a direct scam message, but it includes a suspicious-looking domain (netlify.app subdomain) often associated with phishing/clone sites.

Detected signals: Content is framed as a checker/scan UI: "Is this trustworthy? Paste a message or link", Mentions a "critical" risk level and phishing signs (appears to be analysis output, not the lure itself), Suspicious domain shown: ow-jelly-d18cb1.netlify.app (disposable/hosted subdomain pattern).

Suggested protective actions: Do not enter passwords, OTPs, or payment details on ow-jelly-d18cb1.netlify.app unless you can independently verify it belongs to the real organization If you reached it via an email/SMS, navigate via the official website/app instead of the link Use a URL reputation check (Google Safe Browsing/VirusTotal) and confirm the domain/owner before interacting
